arts.ttl: Latest Arsenal injury news after Mikel Arteta update and suspension worry
arts.sum: However, Partey, who has accumulated three yellow cards in the Champions League this season, will serve a one-match ban and miss the first-leg clash against the French champions. Looking ahead to the Champions League semi-final, Declan Rice, Jurrien Timber and Gabriel Martinelli walked a suspension tightrope for the last-four.

arts.ttl: Dominik Szoboszlai makes Arsenal admission with Liverpool on brink of title win
arts.sum: Liverpool are potentially just one win away from the Premier League title but it depends on what Arsenal do against struggling Ipswich this weekend and Dominik Szoboszlai has revealed the stance inside the Reds’ dressing room

arts.ttl: Fabrizio Romano announces the major Arsenal signing that is only ‘a matter of time’
arts.sum: To that end, Arsenal are close to tying down Myles Lewis-Skelly to a new long-term deal, according to football transfer news reporter Romano. “Talks between Arsenal and Myles-Lewis Skelly are underway as new deal is considered just matter of time,” Romano reported on X .

arts.ttl: ‘Three simple things’ – Real Madrid questions continue after Arsenal victory
arts.sum: For any Arsenal fans who aren’t quite finished revelling in the win over Real Madrid this week, a read of Marca will provide particularly enjoyable reading. The Spanish press has not gone easy on Carlo Ancelotti’s side after Arsenal’s win at the Bernabeu, with questions being asked left, right and centre about what went wrong. The post ‘Three simple things’ – Real Madrid questions continue after Arsenal victory appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.ttl: Arsenal predicted lineup vs Ipswich - Premier League
arts.sum: Arsenal's predicted lineup for their Premier League clash against Ipswich on Sunday afternoon.

arts.ttl: Foord backs Arsenal to turnaround Champions League tie
arts.sum: Arsenal's Caitlin Foord says she backs her side to turn around their Champions League semi-final tie against Lyon after they lost 2-1 at Emirates Stadium.

arts.ttl: Kieran McKenna explains why Arsenal should be worried by Ipswich as Real Madrid point made
arts.sum: Speaking to Ipswich club media, McKenna said: "(The Real Madrid game) doesn't come into our thinking too much. With Ipswich trailing significantly behind West Ham and Wolves in the fight for Premier League survival, McKenna has emphasised his team's determination not to be overwhelmed by the Gunners' form.

arts.ttl: Arsenal set to leave Viktor Gyokeres clear transfer reminder with ambitious Mikel Arteta plan
arts.sum: With nothing to play for in the Premier League, really, except pride, one manager said earlier this week after an enormous win in Europe, that they would play the kids in order to rest key players for the upcoming semi-finals. As for Arsenal, injuries have ravaged the squad, leaving three players out for the rest of the season (Gabriel Magalhaes, Gabriel Jesus, and Takehiro Tomiyasu) whilst Kai Havertz is a very slim contender to be used again if Arsenal get to the final of the Champions League, Arteta revealed on Friday.

arts.ttl: Arsenal favourite Aaron Ramsey new job confirmed as bombshell statement released
arts.sum: The 34-year-old has been placed in interim charge of the Bluebirds for the final three league games of the season, following the club’s decision to sack manager Omer Riza. Former Arsenal midfielder Aaron Ramsey has been tasked with trying to lead Cardiff City to safety in their fight against relegation from the Championship.
